name: Great American Title Agency - Westerville
description_short: Great American Title Agency provides title search, closing coordination, and title insurance services for home purchases and refinances in Ohio since 2007.
description_long:
Great American Title Agency was founded in 2007 by Jason Kiley and has established itself as a title services provider in Ohio. The company has achieved Stewart Title's #1 Remitting Independent Agent status in Ohio for six consecutive years and holds Heritage and Circle of Excellence awards, indicating strong performance within the title insurance industry.

The company offers comprehensive title services across three phases of the home transaction process. Prior to closing, they conduct title searches, coordinate with relevant parties, prepare necessary documents, and schedule settlements. During closing, they manage account funds, review closing documents, and disburse mortgage or sale proceeds. After closing, they satisfy lender requirements, record transfer documents, and issue title insurance policies. They also provide tools like a net-to-seller calculator and title order forms for clients.

Great American Title Agency distinguishes itself through a customer-centric approach, emphasizing that they treat clients like friends and friends like family. They offer a hometown appreciation discount of $50 off title work. The company positions itself around the concept that there is a family behind every file, focusing on the stress homebuyers face during purchases or refinances.

The company operates as a title agency rather than a mortgage lender, meaning they facilitate closings and provide title insurance but do not originate loans. Their service model is transaction-based, dependent on real estate activity in their market. The website provides limited information about pricing transparency, service timelines, or specific title insurance options available to consumers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Stewart Title's #1 Remitting Independent Agent in Ohio for 6 consecutive years
Recipients of Heritage and Circle of Excellence awards from Stewart Title
$50 discount on title work for local customers as appreciation
Full-service title handling from pre-closing through post-closing document recording
Provides net-to-seller calculator and online title order forms for convenience
Founded in 2007 with 17+ years of established operations
Manages all phases of title services including funds accounting and disbursement
cons: Website provides no information on pricing, fee structures, or rate transparency
No details about title insurance policy options or coverage limits offered
Limited information about service timelines or closing speed guarantees
No online reviews or customer testimonials directly on the website
Does not appear to offer services outside of Ohio market
best_for: Ohio homebuyers completing residential purchases or refinances
Real estate agents and lenders seeking coordinated closing services
Sellers wanting clear title documentation and post-closing support
diagnosis: Great American Title Agency is best for Ohio homebuyers and real estate professionals needing reliable title services and closing coordination. The main caveat is that as a title agency, they facilitate closings but do not originate mortgages, and their website lacks transparent pricing information needed for comparing costs.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
